title: Drawdown Circuit Breaker Output
description: Output schema for drawdown_circuit_breaker risk model.

max_drawdown.description: Maximum drawdown over the equity curve (0 = no drawdown, 1 = total loss).

vol_ratio.description: Ratio of recent to baseline realized volatility.

max_position_notional_usd.description: Effective max per-position notional after circuit breaker adjustments.

max_total_notional_usd.description: Maximum total notional (unchanged by circuit breaker).

halt_recovery_hours.description: Hours until halt can be reviewed.
